# leifwind_projects (Data Source)

List projects, optionally filtered by a name substring pattern.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List every project.
data "leifwind_projects" "all" {}

# List projects whose name contains "lib".
data "leifwind_projects" "filtered" {
  pattern = "lib"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `pattern` (String) Substring filter on the name (server-side ILIKE).

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
